issue_title: Text Area Subtype not being disabled
issue_body_preview:
Hi, so I've added the subtype field to be disabled, in hopes of removing the Type field in the Text Area settings, however it's still showing up.
` disabledAttrs: ["access", "className", "name", "maxlength", "rows", "subtype", "toggle", "value"]`
Also tried using the disabledSubtypes, as I only wa
test_description_zh: 在 formBuilder 中配置 disabledAttrs 包含 'subtype'，然后拖拽一个 Text Area 控件到表单中，点击该控件展开其设置面板，观察设置面板中是否还显示 'Type'（subtype）字段。
expected_result_zh: Text Area 控件的设置面板中不应出现 'Type'（subtype）下拉选择字段，该属性已被 disabledAttrs 配置成功禁用隐藏。
